name: claude-code-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code marketplace by @badjilounes — the Board task-tracking plugin, with more to come.

plugins.name: board
plugins.description: Give Claude an audited task board for the tickets it works: turn a ticket into a request, break it into tasks, drive them to done, and keep status, branch, PR and the daily report in sync — then watch open PRs and act on new comments. Bundles the Board MCP server and its watcher workflow as on-demand skills.
